message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Sensor {
  TypesOfSensors: List<string>
  TypesOfSignal: List<string>
  TypeOfSensor: string
  TypeOfSignal: string
  --
  Component(id int, name string, date DateTime, string typeOfSensor, string typeOfSignal)
  GetFunction()
}

class Actuator {
  TypesOfActuators: List<string>
  StatuesOfActuators: List<string>
  TypeOfActuator: string
  StatusOfActuator: string
  --
  Component(id int, name string, date DateTime, string typeOfActuator, string statusOfActuator)
  GetFunction()
}

class Component {
  id: int
  name: string
  date: DateTime
  --
  Component(id int, name string, date DateTime)
  GetFunction()
}

class Program {
  Main(args[] string)
}

class ComponentStore {
  container: ComponentContext
  --
  ComponentStore()
  GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class Proxy {
  components: List<Component>
  componentStore: ComponentStore
  --
  Proxy()
  GetComponent(id int) Component
}

interface IComponent {
  GetComponent(id int) Component
}

class ComponentContext {
  Components: List<Component>
  --
  ComponentContext()
}

Sensor -down-> ComponentContext
Actuator -down-> ComponentContext
Component -down-> ComponentStore
ComponentStore -right-> ComponentContext
Program -down-> Proxy
Proxy -right-> ComponentStore
Proxy -right-> IComponent
Actuator -up-|> Component
Sensor -up-|> Component
@enduml
